summary: GH-66 spec/plan are approved for a docs-only draft closeout: they require draft lifecycle semantics, a complete draft disposition table, absorption of valid analysis into formal docs/contracts, and explicit deferred ownership without claiming implementation completion.
reviewed_validation_summary: Local validation for GH-66 docs-only draft closeout passed git diff --check, .loom JSON jq validation, loom fact-chain, loom suite validate, loom suite carrier validate, and loom suite evidence validate.
follow_ups: Do not treat this approval as UI/App shell/runtime/storage/schema/API/generated facts/fixtures behavior completion.
If a later PR introduces code, schema, API, runtime, generated facts, fixtures, storage, UI behavior, or executable product behavior, use a stronger validation suite.
